calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074/MECH-334/MECH-333 crystallization-necessity TRUE-NEGATIVE-CONTROL retest (+MECH-341/313 floor contrast): strip the always-on diversity floor (noise_floor/E3-diversity/dACC-suppression off; structured curiosity decoupled from crystallize) so crystallization is the SOLE phase-3 diversity route in ARM_1; phase-dependent entropy bonus (0.02 generator in phases 0-2, swept {0,0.005,0.02} in phase 3) maps the collapse threshold; ARM_4 floor-on (MECH-341/313). 5 conditions x 3 seeds, IGW-023 Phase-3 pressure. Supersedes 610e (confounded control).
items.note: Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610e_2026-06-05 (confounded negative control). 610e was the FIRST harness-fixed crystallization run (policy genuinely trained, expansion stepped 1249 params, ewc_penalty in loss) but d2_control_shows_collapse=FALSE because MECH-313 noise floor + MECH-341 E3 score-diversity + the always-on policy entropy bonus held diversity up in BOTH arms -> INV-074's collapse-without-crystallization premise was never instantiated. 610f makes ARM_0 a TRUE NEGATIVE: (a) strip noise_floor + E3 score-diversity + dACC anti-recency suppression, and decouple structured curiosity from crystallize, in the stripped arms so the ONLY ARM_0-vs-ARM_1 difference is crystallize_at_phase3; (b) make the policy entropy bonus PHASE-DEPENDENT -- ENTROPY_BONUS_TRAIN=0.02 in phases 0-2 (every arm; generates the diversity so D3 sanity is non-vacuous + crystallization has something real to preserve) and SWEPT in phase 3 {ARM_0=0.0, ARM_2=0.005, ARM_3=0.02} to map where the control starts to collapse; (c) ARM_4 = stripped control + noise_floor + E3 score-diversity ON to test MECH-341/313's robust-floor reading honestly (the fork-c observation 610e could only note, now scored via D4). Carries forward the MANDATORY startup assertion (_assert_fixes_wired ERRORs the run if policy-train / expansion-step / ewc-penalty wiring is missing). Acceptance: D1 ARM_1.end_p3 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10; D2 ARM_0.end_p2 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10 (true-negative collapses); D3 both > 0.4 at phase2; PASS = D1 AND D2 AND D3. D4 ARM_4.end_p3 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10 scores MECH-341/313 (per-claim). evidence_direction_per_claim emitted (5 claims). Pre-registered fork: D2 FAIL with D3 holding = V3 policy not WTA-prone -> non_contributory-for-INV-074 (universal invariant NOT weakened), escalate Phase-3 pressure; D2 PASS + D1 FAIL = weakens MECH-334 -> /diagnose-errors. ~35h cloud run (610e actual ~142 min/run x 15 runs). 10th crystallization-arm result; FIRST with both harness fixed AND a genuine true-negative control.

items.title: PARALLEL-RACE CLONE of V3-EXQ-640b on ree-cloud-4: identical SD-057/MECH-346/MECH-347 cue-authority gain sweep (cue_recall_gain{0.2,1.0,5.0} x kappa{2.0,10.0} + ARM_OFF, 3 seeds, use_modulatory_selection_authority=True+gain=0.5). Queued to run alongside the slow 640b instance on DLAPTOP-4.local; whichever finishes first is THE evidence.
items.note: PARALLEL-RACE CLONE of V3-EXQ-640b (byte-identical design/acceptance/claim tags; only QUEUE_ID + EXPERIMENT_TYPE differ so the runner outcome sentinel + written manifest do not collide with 640b). Pinned to ree-cloud-4 to run in parallel with the slow 640b on DLAPTOP-4.local. GOVERNANCE: 652 and 640b test the SAME SD-057/MECH-346/MECH-347 question -- only ONE may count toward confidence. At review, keep the FIRST to complete and set evidence_direction:superseded on the other's manifest to avoid double-counting. Smoke --dry-run PASS end-to-end 2026-06-07 (7 arms, cue fires, z_goal ~0.45, outcome=PASS). NOTE: ree-cloud-4 heartbeat was ~3.5h stale at queue time -- entry will be claimed once cloud-4 is online.

items.title: SD-057/MECH-346/MECH-347 cue-authority lineage CLEAN EVIDENCE retest: re-run the 640a scaffold cue-recall gain sweep (cue_recall_gain{0.2,1.0,5.0} x kappa{2.0,10.0} + ARM_OFF, 3 seeds) now that modulatory-bias-selection-authority is VALIDATED (V3-EXQ-643a PASS). use_modulatory_selection_authority=True+gain=0.5 on every arm so the cue->z_goal->MECH-295 approach bias has bounded authority over the E3.select argmin in the contact-making scaffold P2 env. Promotes 640a (diagnostic, flat lift, authority OFF) to EVIDENCE.
items.note: EVIDENCE (claim_ids=[SD-057,MECH-346,MECH-347], all v3_pending; serial L6 cue-recall -> L4 token-pointer seed -> SD-057 bank chain co-tagged because the post-cue approach lift cannot be attributed to one link). Acceptance: PRIMARY C_LIFT_PRIMARY = post_cue_approach_lift>0 over within-run background on >=2/3 seeds in the pre-registered decisive cell ARM_CUE_g5_k10 (maximal cue_pull); GUARDS C1 cue fires + C2 trace captured (no-trace -> non_contributory instrumentation FAIL, route /diagnose-errors, NOT evidence-against). overall=C1 AND C2 AND C_LIFT_PRIMARY. evidence_direction: supports / weakens / non_contributory per the gate. Secondary (reported, not verdict-driving, multiple-comparison caveat): C_LIFT_ANY across 6 cells + gain-monotonicity. The single change vs 640a is use_modulatory_selection_authority=True+gain=0.5 (validated V3-EXQ-643a PASS 2026-06-06 after the float32 catastrophic-cancellation fix); NO SD-056 online training in this harness so scores stay bounded and no rollout-norm clamp is needed. Smoke --dry-run PASS end-to-end 2026-06-07 (7 arms, cue fires 30-60/run, z_goal forms ~0.42-0.46, acceptance machinery exercised). seeds=3 x conditions=7 -> 21 verdict lines; episodes_per_run=235 (stage0 20+stage0b 10+P0 120+P1 70+P2 15).
